data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional mapping to stable system code.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Optional mapping to stable system code for deterministic workflows'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on creating resources and managing bookings but do not address the specific requirement of validating the mapping to stable system codes as defined in the use case.
gaps: No evidence of validation for optional mapping to stable system code.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
